headline: Palo Alto To Rally Around 19%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Tuesday
summary: Top Wall Street analysts changed their outlook on top names. See analyst rating changes and targets for WULF, NTRS, MGM, CSX, PINS, PANW, CF and ENLT.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on CF Industries Holdings, Lowers Price Target to $115
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Vincent Andrews   maintains CF Industries Holdings (NYSE:CF) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $135 to $115.
